description: City blocks (regular building array). Pedestrian wind, 3 surrounding-height configs (0H/1H/2H) x 3 wind directions (0/22.5/45 deg).
normalization: velocity ratio = local speed / inflow velocity at SAME height (incident normalization, given by experiment)
geometry_note: Geometry sheet is schematic only (image). Building array layout must be extracted from AIJ Case C schematic. 0H/1H/2H = surrounding building height variants.
open_questions: Confirm exact 8-cube ring layout matches schematic (corners + edge-midpoints of 3x3 grid, centre per config).
INCIDENT normalization given by experiment (ratio=local/inflow at same height) - no reference ambiguity.
Start with ONE config+direction (e.g. 1H, 0deg, std k-e) full convergence protocol before running all 9.
method_reminder: Same convergence protocol: equilibrium seed, probe freeze, q only after stationarity. City array = canyons between blocks, different physics than isolated bluff body - may behave better than A/B for steady k-e.

geometry.type: compact group of cubes (city blocks), NOT infinite array
geometry.layout: 8 surrounding cubes in a 3x3 ring (corners + edge-midpoints), centre varies by config

configs_meaning.0H: centre EMPTY (ring of 8 cubes, no central building)

geometry.surrounding_cubes: 8 identical cubes, same in all 3 configs
geometry.measurement_points: in canyons between blocks, pedestrian level z=0.02m, X,Y from -0.30..+0.30 step 0.05
geometry.cube: cubic D=0.2m (side length D, H=D=0.2m) — CONFIRMED from AIJ Case C spec (SimScale validation)

reference_velocity.definition: UH = approaching flow velocity at building height H=D=0.2m
reference_velocity.from_inflow: interpolate inflow U at z=0.2m (=3.654 m/s from inflow table at z=200mm)
reference_velocity.note: normalization in results is INCIDENT (local/inflow at same height), but UH at H is the canonical reference

source_confirmed: AIJ Guidebook 2008; same Case C validated publicly by SimScale (R=0.72-0.86 reported on Case C/D) — public cross-check available unlike A/B
